code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
end

let total = list.len(nums)
mut out = ""
mut j = total - 1
while j >= 0
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == total - 1
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j - 1
end

println(out)
